$comment: SINGLE SOURCE for the Vacation Care PES (Simplify Bookings) handoff. Edit this only; scripts/build-handoff.mjs generates HANDOFF.md, handoff.html, handover/*.json into this folder. Bump version + add a changelog row on every change.
title: Vacation Care — PES (Simplify Bookings)
summary: Parent-facing mobile flow to request/book a Vacation Care space for a child. Dark iOS-style app: New Booking → pick child → pick session → pick dates → review → request confirmed. 'Done' = a parent can request a space (waitlisted) or book a priced session across one or more dates and reach a confirmation. Counterpart to the Office desktop flow.
outOfScope: Real availability / pricing data and payment
Recurring (weekly) booking builder beyond the Casual/Recurring toggle

components.name: pes-nav-header
components.notes: top nav: centred title + back, or large title with close/back

components.name: pes-field
components.notes: tappable select field (label + value/placeholder + chevron) — dark equivalent of ds-input select

components.name: pes-calendar
components.notes: Sun-start month grid; available/waitlist/disabled day states + legend

components.name: pes-list-row
components.notes: child (avatar+name+service) and grouped session (name/price + time) rows

components.name: pes-cta
components.notes: full-width bottom button; orange-600 enabled, grey disabled

motion.notes: Each screen rises/fades in ~320ms. prefers-reduced-motion removes it.

screens.name: New Booking
screens.purpose: Assemble a booking: child, booking type, session, then dates.
screens.exit: Each field opens a picker (S2/S3/S4); Review → S5 when complete
layout: Booking type: Casual / Recurring (tappable) with helper line
Field: Dates → Select dates (appears once a session is chosen)
Pinned bottom CTA 'Review' (disabled until child + session + dates)

copy.text: Child's name / Booking type / Session(s) / Dates

behaviour: Tapping Child's name → S2; Session(s) → S3; Dates → S4.
Booking type toggles Casual ⇄ Recurring (helper text updates).
Dates field appears only after a session is selected; changing the session clears dates.
Review is enabled only when a child, a session, and ≥1 date are set.
a11y: Fields and CTA are buttons with accessible names; ≥44px targets.
Disabled CTA is conveyed by more than colour (it does not advance).

acceptance.text: Review is disabled until child + session + ≥1 date.
Dates field appears only after a session is chosen.

screens.name: Select Child
screens.purpose: Choose the child the booking is for.
screens.exit: Tap a child → S1 with child set; back → S1
layout: List rows: avatar + name + service (Little Bugs)

redlines.spec: avatar 40px; name 16px; service grey-500 13px; divider grey-1100

behaviour: Tapping a child sets it and returns to S1.
a11y: Rows are buttons with the child's name as accessible name.

acceptance.text: Selecting a child returns to S1 with it set.

screens.name: Select Session
screens.purpose: Choose the session type to book.
screens.exit: Tap a session → S1 with session set
layout: Grouped list: Before School Care / After School Care / Vacation Care / Other
Row: name + price (left), time range (right). 'Request a space' (Other) = waitlist, no time

copy.text: BEFORE SCHOOL CARE / AFTER SCHOOL CARE / VACATION CARE / OTHER
Request a space — Billing determined by admin

behaviour: Tapping a session sets it (and its waitlist flag) and returns to S1.
a11y: Group headers are non-interactive; rows are buttons.

acceptance.text: 'Request a space' marks the booking as waitlist.

screens.name: Select date(s)
screens.purpose: Pick one or more dates for the session.

copy.text: Select one or more dates you would like to book for {session}

redlines.spec: 36px circle; selected available = orange-500, selected waitlist = purple-550 fill

behaviour: Tapping an available/waitlist day toggles its selection; disabled days (weekends + blocked) and out-of-month days are not selectable.
Selected available days fill orange; selected waitlist-only days fill purple.
Save is enabled once ≥1 date is selected and returns to S1.
a11y: Day buttons have the date as accessible name; disabled days are non-interactive.
Available/waitlist distinction has the legend text, not colour alone.

acceptance.text: Disabled and out-of-month days can't be selected.
Save is disabled until ≥1 date selected.
Selected day fill matches its kind.

screens.name: Review request
screens.purpose: Review the assembled booking before confirming.
layout: 'Your booking': CHILD, SESSION, dates (with Waitlist-only pill if applicable)
Teal alert (pricing applies to available dates only)

copy.text: Pricing details only apply to available dates. Waitlisted bookings will have their pricing information attached if confirmed.

behaviour: Waitlist sessions show the Waitlist-only pill and a £0.00 total.
Priced sessions total = session price × number of dates.
a11y: Back and Confirm are buttons; alert text contrast ≥ 4.5:1 on the dark surface.

acceptance.text: Waitlist total is £0.00 and shows the pill.

screens.name: Request confirmed
layout: CHILD / SESSION / DATE(S) summary + Waitlist-only pill

copy.text: You will receive an email shortly for all confirmed booking details.

behaviour: Done resets all state and returns to S1.
a11y: Success conveyed by the alert text, not the icon alone.

openQuestions.q: Recurring booking: full weekly-pattern builder is out of scope here — confirm its own flow.
Where do available vs waitlist date states + pricing come from (service availability API)?
Leading/trailing calendar cells render as '·' in the proto; Figma shows greyed adjacent-month dates — confirm desired.

decisions.decision: Built dark on Stardust primitives (grey-1200/1100/1000, orange-500/600, purple-550, cyan-500) — the same tokens the Figma uses.
decisions.rationale: Exact-style reproduction of the mobile booking app while staying on-token.

decisions.decision: Waitlist ('Request a space') shows purple dates + £0.00; priced sessions total price × dates.

changelog.change: Initial PES handoff (New Booking → child → session → dates → review → confirmed).
